purpose: After RunOCR Cycle 1 (folder move / naming / utils split / layout split), add maintainer-facing doc comments to all 8 RunOCR operational files.
Make it possible for a new maintainer to open any of these files and immediately understand role, responsibility boundary, and modification cautions.
Comments-only patch — no logic / JSX / import / state / handler changes.
files_modified_verification_scripts_tmp_: mysuit-ocr/tmp/check_runocr_response_mapping_boundary_2c.mjs (strip comments before forbidden-import scan; logic-only equality for buildOcrFormData backup compare)

headers_added.RunOcrWorkspace.tsx: RunOCR 탭 최상위 Workspace. 상태/실행/오케스트레이션. Cross-links: FormData=utils/buildOcrFormData, API=utils/runOcrRequest, mapping=utils/mapOcrResponse, layout=ui/RunOcrResultLayout. history/autofill/restore still owned by Workspace.
headers_added.RunOcrResultLayout.tsx: 결과 화면 layout 전용 presentational. node composition only — viewer/resultPanel/scanOverlay/hiddenFileInput. No OCR domain/API/history/autofill awareness; does not import child components directly.
headers_added.OcrResultPanel.tsx: Preview/Custom/Validation/Clean JSON/Markdown/Raw JSON 결과 패널. Delegates formatting to @/lib/cleanJsonBuilder, markdownReportBuilder, structuredTableViewModel, invoiceTableDisplay. No API/viewer/history responsibility; revalidate/partialOcr injected via parent callbacks.
headers_added.OcrDocViewer.tsx: Read-only document viewer with bbox overlay and scale computation. No OCR API/mapping/history; corner-adjust UI is separate (CornerAdjust); Custom-tab editing is OcrCanvasPane's job.
headers_added.CornerAdjust.tsx: Normalized corner adjustment UI. Click-to-place when <4 corners, drag-to-adjust when 4 corners. Coordinates exposed in 0~1 normalized space via onCornersChange. No API/mapping/history responsibility.
headers_added.buildOcrFormData.ts: /ocr/extract FormData composer. Maintains key contract: file / template_id / regions / model_id / documentType (with documented append order + conditions). Backend contract change requires parity check.
headers_added.runOcrRequest.ts: OCR API call helper: endpoint resolution + buildOcrFormData + fetch + !res.ok + res.json. No UI loading/error state, response mapping, history, autofill. Error('OCR 요청 실패') paired with workspace catch — do not edit.
headers_added.mapOcrResponse.ts: Raw OCR response -> OcrResult pure mapping. Forbidden: autofill/history/restore/localStorage/React. normalizeFieldKey is the dependency-injection seam to avoid direct autofillEngine import. Output shape change ripples to Preview/Custom/Validation/Clean JSON/Markdown.

OcrResultPanel.tsx: export default function OcrResultPanel (props groups summary)

over_commenting_avoidance: Did not comment simple setter/toggle handlers
Did not comment JSX node variables or derived useMemo locals
Did not annotate each prop field individually (OcrResultPanel: props-group summary only)
Did not repeat the same role description across files (cross-linked via short paths)

comments_only_diff_verification.method: Per file: strip block + line comments, normalize whitespace to single spaces, compare with backup snapshot. Equal -> commentsOnly: true.

boundary_check_script_adjustments_for_3b.change: Strip block/line comments before keyword leak scan. JSDoc that mentions boundary keywords for documentation no longer triggers false-positive.

Strip comments before forbidden-import scan; widen buildOcrFormData backup-equality from byte-equal to comments-stripped + whitespace-normalized equality. Logic invariant preserved; doc comments tolerated.
